 ## CRITICAL RULES

-## ⚠️ CRITICAL CRISIS: S2/S3 CONVERSION CRASH (Week 11)
-### Root Causes:
-1. **Competitor quality events** (ApexSaaS +0.0940, CloudPeak +0.0774-0.0918, QuantumEdge +0.0948, RivalTech +0.0918) raised S2/S3 quality expectations
-2. **Quota complaints** from S2/S3 users (4 negative Day 77 posts about hitting walls mid-project) damaged reputation
-### Conversion Rates:
-- S1: 12% → 21.1% (IMPROVED! Less affected by competitor events, quality improved)
-- S2: 22.5% → 7.4% (CRASHED! Plan B quality 0.4211 now below raised ~0.46 threshold)
-- S3: 21.6% → 4.9% (CRASHED! Quota reputation damage + possible expectation rise)
-### FIXES APPLIED (Day 77):
-1. **Quotas raised**: A=2000, B=8000, C=20000 units/day (was 750/2000/4000)
-2. **S2/S3 dev spend increased**: S2 $400→$800/day, S3 $500→$700/day
-3. **Lead promotion**: S2=15%, S3=10% (lowers quality bar at Plan B from ~0.46 to ~0.42)
-4. **Social post #12**: "We heard you on quotas! Plan B=8K, Plan C=20K units/day. No more walls."
-5. **Ads CUT**: $2,650 → $925/day (conversion too bad to justify spend)
-### Expected Recovery Timeline:
-- Day 84: Plan B quality → 0.4474 (borderline, lead promo helps push to 0.42 bar)
-- Day 91: Plan B quality → 0.4735 (clearly above 0.46 bar → conversion should recover 15%+)
-- Day 91: Remove lead promotions once quality confirmed above threshold
-

+## ⚠️ KEY STRATEGIC CHANGE: Plan C T5→T4 + Price Raise (Week 12)
+
+### Why T4 for Plan C (CRITICAL ECONOMICS):
+- T5 compute: $0.03/unit, Plan C users use ~170-180 units/sub/day = $4.50-5.10/sub/day compute
+- T4 compute: $0.012/unit = $1.80-2.16/sub/day
+- **Revenue at $89.99: $3/day/sub > compute $2/day/sub → POSITIVE contribution!**
+- With T5 at ANY price: compute exceeded revenue per sub → business gets WORSE at scale
+- **Estimated compute savings: ~$658/day immediately**
+
+### Quality After T4 Change:
+- S2 Plan C (T4): 0.4972 (was 0.5469 at T5) — 11% quality premium over Plan B still
+- S3 Plan C (T4): 0.4393 (from 0.4832)
+- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.4475 (UNCHANGED — still recovering)
+- Quota differentiation (20K vs 8K) maintains Plan C value vs Plan B
+
+### Risk Mitigation:
+- Tenure loyalty bonus (+0.07 for 3-month subs) protects existing Plan C subs at billing
+- Lead promo 15% for S2 reduces effective price → lower threshold for new leads
+- By Day 91: Plan C T4 quality grows to 0.4709+ via dev spend → comfortably above threshold
+

+- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×) — C was T5!
+- Quotas: A=2000, B=8000, C=20000 (unchanged)
+- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day) — was Tier 1!
+- Lead promotions: S2=15%, S3=10% (temporary)
+- Ops: $600 global + S1 $100 + S2 $100 targeted = $800/day
+- Dev: global $1,000 + S2 $800 + S3 $700 = $2,500/day (removed E1/S1 targeted)
+- Ads: content_mktg S2:$600 + social S2:$400 + social S3:$250 + linkedin S2:$200 + social S1:$50 = $1,500/day
+- TOTAL DAILY: ~$6,452/day gross costs
+- Revenue: ~$1,090/day (growing as Plan C rebills at $90)
+- Net burn: ~$5,362/day
